title: Frontend Developer
description:
About the job

echnical Qualifications

• 5+ years of experience in front-end development and/or web development using React, .NET, JavaScript, and TypeScript

• Familiarity with the Tanzu platform

• Familiarity with Git for code and version control

• Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines using Git

• Experience reading and writing SQL stored procedures

• Experience programming/coding in Python

• Bachelor's Degree or equivalent




Communication and Collaboration

• Ability to document code meticulously

• Familiarity with the Agile development lifecycle
